description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark hip roof and a white exterior, situated on a rectangular plot of green lawn. The property is surrounded by a white fence and features several mature trees, providing shade and privacy. The front of the house has a central entryway with a small porch, flanked by symmetrically arranged windows. On one side of the yard, there is a driveway with parked cars and a patio area, while the opposite side features a backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. The landscaping includes paved walkways, garden beds, and outdoor seating areas, creating a comfortable and inviting residential environment. The overall design is clean and orderly, with a focus on outdoor leisure and family living.
description: A two-story white suburban house with a dark hip roof, surrounded by a white fence, trees, a driveway, and a backyard pool. The property features symmetrical windows, a central entryway, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, driveway with cars, and a fenced yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked cars, and the side garden area with trees and a patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge area, and more trees within the fenced property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, patio with umbrella, and the rear entry to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a small porch, steps, and flanking windows, no columns or elaborate overhang.
